insight: Given that you've just started with one session completed, it's great that you've already established a foundation to build upon, and focusing on small incremental improvements will be key to increasing your average score of 20% over time. To keep your 1-day streak going, try to identify one specific concept or question type from your last session that you struggled with and make a plan to review and practice it before your next session to see a score boost.

alerts.msg: Last score was 20%. Agent recommends reviewing before continuing.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
